nasb.text: And he who is physically uncircumcised, if he keeps the Law, will he not judge you who though having the letter of the Law and circumcision are a transgressor of the Law?

esv.text: Then he who is physically uncircumcised but keeps the law will condemn you who have the written code and circumcision but break the law.

cnv.text: 那本來沒有受割禮卻遵守律法的人，就要審判你這有儀文和割禮而犯律法的人。

ccb.text: 身体未受割礼却遵行律法的人，必审判你这有律法条文、受了割礼却违犯律法的人。

csbs.text: 并且，那生来没有受割礼却完全实行律法的人，对你这虽有律法条文和割礼却违犯律法的人，难道不是要施行审判吗？
